name: Green Bean & Garlic Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Green beans, cut into 1 1/2-inch lengths
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the water, salt, thyme, bay leaf, and olive oil in a soup pot and bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat to a simmer and squeeze in the garlic.
3. Add the green beans and simmer, uncovered, for 10-12 minutes.
4. Adjust seasonings as needed.
5. Beat the egg in a bowl and ladle some soup into the egg, stirring.
6. Return the mixture to the pot, stirring continuously.
7. Add pepper. Let simmer a few minutes, tasting to ensure the flavors blend.
8. Serve topped with parsley and/or croutons.
